world.name: NOVA World
world.description: A voxel RPG world powered by Bifrost

biomes.name: Dungeon
biomes.description: Dark caverns hiding rats, skeletons, and worse

biomes.name: Village
biomes.description: The central settlement — NPCs and quests

biomes.name: River
biomes.description: A river with a stone bridge

arcs.title: The Goblin Threat
arcs.synopsis: Goblin raids have grown bolder. The village elder calls for a hero.

beats.title: First Contact
beats.description: Players encounter goblins raiding the northern farms.

beats.title: The Warchief
beats.description: A goblin warchief unites the clans under one banner.

beats.title: Final Assault
beats.description: The united goblin horde marches on the village.

arcs.title: Secrets of the Dungeon
arcs.synopsis: Ancient magic stirs in the deepest chambers.

beats.title: Strange Sounds
beats.description: Villagers report eerie sounds from the dungeon entrance.

beats.title: The Ancient Tome
beats.description: The Wizard senses dark energy from a recovered tome.

npcs.name: Guard Captain
lines: The wolves in the forest have been attacking farmers. We need a hero!
Those mountain goblins are getting bolder every day.
npcs.systemPrompt: You are the Guard Captain of a small village. You are stern, duty-bound, and worried about wolf attacks on the farms. You give quests to capable adventurers.
npcs.currentGoal: Find someone to deal with the wolf problem

npcs.name: Innkeeper Bram
lines: Welcome, traveller! Giant rats have infested my cellar — a nightmare!
My finest ale for whoever clears those rats.
npcs.systemPrompt: You are Bram, the jovial innkeeper. You love ale, gossip, and keeping a clean establishment. Your cellar has a terrible rat problem.
npcs.currentGoal: Get someone to clear the rats from my cellar

npcs.name: Blacksmith Helga
lines: I forge the best weapons in three kingdoms.
Keep your blade sharp and your wits sharper.
npcs.systemPrompt: You are Helga, master blacksmith. You are proud of your craft, no-nonsense, and respect those who prove their worth in battle.
npcs.currentGoal: Craft and sell the finest weapons

npcs.name: Village Elder
lines: Goblins raid our northern farms every new moon.
Cleanse the mountains of those green menaces!
npcs.systemPrompt: You are the wise Village Elder. You have seen many dangers and guide the village with calm authority. You are deeply worried about the goblin threat.
npcs.currentGoal: Protect the village from goblin raids

npcs.name: Old Wizard Mervyn
lines: There is an ancient tome deep within the dungeon.
Retrieve it and I shall teach you powerful magic.
npcs.systemPrompt: You are Mervyn, an eccentric old wizard. You are obsessed with ancient magic and mysterious artifacts. You speak in slightly archaic language.
npcs.currentGoal: Recover the ancient tome from the dungeon

items.name: Wolf Pelt
items.description: A rough wolf pelt. Useful for crafting.

items.name: Ancient Coin
items.description: A coin from a forgotten civilization.

items.name: Overlord's Crown
items.description: The crown of the Dungeon Overlord. Radiates dark power.
